     * @returns {number} The total cost.

        for (const i of S) {

            const rightNeighbor = nums[i + 1];

            const requiredValue = Math.max(leftNeighbor, rightNeighbor) + 1;

            // Cost is max(0, Required - Current)

        return totalCost;
    };

    // 1. Determine Candidate Set S1 (Starting at index 1)

    }

    // 2. Determine Candidate Set S2 (Starting at index 2)

        S2.push(i);
    }

    // 3. Calculate costs
    let cost1 = calculateCost(S1);
    let cost2 = calculateCost(S2);

    // 4. Return the minimum cost
    return Math.min(cost1, cost2);
}
